sentences.target: Je cherche un logement près du métro.

translations.fr: Je cherche un logement près du métro.
translations.en: I'm looking for housing near the subway.
translations.es: Busco una vivienda cerca del metro.
translations.de: Ich suche eine Wohnung in der Nähe der U-Bahn.
translations.it: Cerco un alloggio vicino alla metropolitana.
translations.ko: 지하철 근처에서 살 집을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找靠近地铁的住房。
translations.ru: Я ищу жильё рядом с метро.
translations.pt: Procuro uma casa perto do metro.
translations.he: אני מחפש דירה ליד הרכבת התחתית.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm chỗ ở gần ga tàu điện ngầm.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن سكن قريب من المترو.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een woning dicht bij de metro.
translations.hi: मैं मेट्रो के पास घर ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter bolig nær T-banen.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari tempat tinggal dekat kereta bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter boende nära tunnelbanan.
translations.ro: Caut o locuință aproape de metrou.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter bolig tæt på metroen.
translations.ja: 地下鉄の近くの住まいを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb 'cherche'.
Lexical verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting 'un logement' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'logement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Adverb functioning as the head of the fixed prepositional locution 'près de', expressing proximity.
Fused form of preposition 'de' and definite article 'le' (masculine singular); introduces the complement 'métro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: On visite un logement ce matin.

translations.fr: On visite un logement ce matin.
translations.en: We're viewing a place this morning.
translations.es: Vamos a ver un piso esta mañana.
translations.de: Wir besichtigen heute Morgen eine Wohnung.
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã vamos ver um apartamento.
translations.tr: Bu sabah bir evi görmeye gidiyoruz.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi đi xem nhà.
translations.nl: We gaan vanmorgen een woning bezichtigen.
translations.uk: Цього ранку ми йдемо дивитися квартиру.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हम एक घर देखने जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί θα δούμε ένα διαμέρισμα.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig skal vi se på en leilighet.
translations.id: Pagi ini kami akan melihat apartemen.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen ska vi titta på en lägenhet.
translations.ro: În această dimineață mergem să vedem un apartament.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno se jdeme podívat na byt.
translations.da: Her til morgen skal vi ud og se en lejlighed.
translations.ja: 今朝、物件を見に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; agrees as 3rd person singular with 'visite'.
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'un logement' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'logement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'visite'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'matin' in the temporal expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement meaning 'this morning'.

sentences.target: Le logement coûte trop cher pour nous.
sentences.reading: /lə lɔʒmɑ̃ kut tʁo ʃɛʁ puʁ nu/

translations.fr: Le logement coûte trop cher pour nous.
translations.ipa: /lə lɔʒmɑ̃ kut tʁo ʃɛʁ puʁ nu/
translations.en: The housing costs too much for us.
translations.es: La vivienda es demasiado cara para nosotros.
translations.de: Die Wohnung ist für uns zu teuer.
translations.it: L'alloggio è troppo caro per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这套房子对我们来说太贵了。
translations.yue: 嗰個單位對我哋嚟講太貴。
translations.pt: O apartamento é demasiado caro para nós.
translations.vi: Căn hộ đó quá đắt đối với chúng tôi.
translations.nl: De woning is te duur voor ons.
translations.hu: Az a lakás túl drága nekünk.
translations.hi: यह घर हमारे लिए बहुत महंगा है.
translations.pl: Mieszkanie jest dla nas zbyt drogie.
translations.el: Το σπίτι είναι πολύ ακριβό για εμάς.
translations.nb: Leiligheten er for dyr for oss.
translations.id: Tempat tinggal itu terlalu mahal bagi kami.
translations.sv: Bostaden är för dyr för oss.
translations.ro: Locuința este prea scumpă pentru noi.
translations.cs: Bydlení je pro nás příliš drahé.
translations.da: Boligen er for dyr for os.
translations.ja: その物件は私たちには高すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun 'logement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'coûte'.
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the subject 'Le logement'.
Degree adverb modifying 'cher' to indicate excess.
Adjective used adverbially as a complement to 'coûte', meaning 'expensive'.
Preposition introducing the beneficiary/comparison 'nous'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu dois trouver un logement rapidement.

translations.fr: Tu dois trouver un logement rapidement.
translations.en: You need to find housing quickly.
translations.de: Du musst schnell eine Wohnung finden.
translations.it: Devi trovare un alloggio in fretta.
translations.vi: Bạn cần nhanh chóng tìm chỗ ở.
translations.nl: Je moet snel een woning vinden.
translations.hi: तुम्हें जल्दी से घर ढूँढना होगा.
translations.id: Kamu perlu cepat mencari tempat tinggal.
translations.ja: 早く住まいを見つける必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'dois'.
Modal verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive 'trouver'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of 'dois', taking 'un logement' as its direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'logement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'trouver'.
Adverb modifying 'trouver', indicating manner.

On visite un logement ce matin.
Le logement coûte trop cher pour nous.
Tu dois trouver un logement rapidement.
